Title: Yashiro, Yukio
Overview: Director of the Institute for Art Research in Tokyo; Botticelli scholar. His archives are housed at the Museum of Modern Art, Hayama and Kamakura.
Archives:
• The Yashiro-Berenson Correspondence, I Tatti. http://yashiro.itatti.harvard.edu/correspondence.
  • Yukio Yashiro Archive, Museum of Modern Art, Kamakura & Hayama Archives. http://www.moma.pref.kanagawa.jp/storage/en/museum/archive.html.
